description: A photograph depicting a landscape severely affected by forest degradation, likely from widespread tree mortality. The foreground is dominated by dry, yellow-brown grassland with scattered tree stumps and a few small, green coniferous saplings. In the midground and background, numerous bare, grey, dead trees (snags) stand upright, extending up a hillside. Several clusters of live, green coniferous trees are visible among the deadwood. The sky is overcast and light grey. The scene illustrates extensive tree mortality across a broad area, characteristic of impacts such as bark beetle infestations, drought, or past forest fires.
